title: celmisia semicordata subsp. stricta
intro: Celmisia semicordata subsp. stricta, also known as the mountain daisy or strict mountain daisy, is a plant species native to New Zealand. It is a perennial herb with medicinal properties, traditionally used to treat various health issues due to its anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Celmisia semicordata subsp. stricta include reducing inflammation, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Herbal preparations of this plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be used to alleviate symptoms of colds, flu, and respiratory infections, as well as to promote wound healing.
